component.name: Robotics Studio Open
component.summary: Local-first IDE for reviewed teleop and VLA datasets

description.p: Robotics Studio Open reviews robotics episodes locally, scrubs synchronized sensor streams, clusters failures, and exports explicit handoff manifests.
Robot media and dataset content stay local by default. Telemetry and crash reporting are opt-in only.
Staged Proofline UI/UX package metadata. No Linux artifact is published or verified.
Initial historical Linux package metadata for Robotics Studio Open distribution.
